Sword of Blessings  
 

No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 19 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
MANA: +50
Effect: Purge (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 7.0)
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: PAL
Race: HUM ERU HIE HEF DWF HFL GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Sword of Blessings
No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 19 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
MANA: +50
Effect: Purge (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 7.0)
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: PAL
Race: HUM ERU HIE HEF DWF HFL GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Heebee Eldee
Lucy Entry By:Smari
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-11 10:04:03
Page Updated:Sat Sep 7th, 2019

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 1
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Velketor's Labyrinth
NPC Name
Jelek Icepaw


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Velketor's Labyrinth


Uploaded November 7th, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Sword
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2002 at 2:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253838981
20 posts
Lanadan - a Paladin in Werewolf form! No wonder, hehe, having trouble resisting the darkside? Fun little trip into LD isn't it? Gratz on your sword.

Thoringvar
▲ Page top
SWEET
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2002 at 9:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770561065
119 posts
This sword absolutely rocks. I want it so bad I can taste it.

Our guild was lucky enough to snag this camp one day, we kept it clean for hours, took down the pally mob 3 times and did not get the sword :( We did however loot the SK sword (given to the mage's pet 30 sec before it rotted) and a huge stack of spells and valuable loot :)

I've been back a few times trying to get into a group, but no luck. So my guess is it's rare and in demand.


As a side note, I found that venturing down there alone is a BAD idea as there is no way out without A) TP/TL B) camping against the wall (this "bug" leaves you upstairs at the front hall - but takes a few attempts) That is, assuming you can invis past the doggies. I was unable to even bribe my way out with 150pp ( asked several wiz/druids)

So bring a group, have fun and good luck to everyone seeing this fine weapon.

▲ Page top
Great Sword
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2002 at 6:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791442183
View User Forum
9 posts
My 54 Paly was in TS at Velks when LD called out the this sword dropped and was lucky enough to be the first to get there and loot it.

Dmg 19 + 9 bonus with delay of 25

While I never tried right clicking I did notice during the fight i would lifetap the mob for 32 points of life and was healed for that same 32.
sweet

Lanandor
54 Paladin
Knights of Eternal Light
Cazic Thule
▲ Page top
RE: Great Sword
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2002 at 7:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791442183
View User Forum
9 posts
Addendum to previous message:

I really feel like an idiot. The lifetap was a proc from werewolf form. But the sword is still deals out awesome damage.

My apologies for the misinformation.

Lanandor
▲ Page top
RE: Great Sword
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2002 at 7:16 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253459527
45 posts
LOL I don't mean this in a bad way I just think it's funny, you have no idea how many times people try out a new weapon when I have them booned on my chanter and they go ******* when they see themselves proc a lifetap so frequently. 100dex and 60% speed and they are procing every few seconds and they think they just found the new priceless weapon that noone else has ever seen. Again don't mean this in a bad way just funny that you realized it yourself afterwards because most don't, they just figure their luck ran out on the procs or VI screwed em by nerfing their weapon. :)
Spunkmidg 52 pally
Supmidg 52 chanter
Weemidg 37 wizzy
▲ Page top
sweet sword
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2002 at 1:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779900209
15 posts
this sword is sweet, i have my 42nd Paladin here to loot it because people are so nice! :) been here about a week so far, no luck.. about 5 spawns of Jelek Icepaw, and no sword :/ hopefully it will turn up soon though!

ps - VI you suck for making dw armor with pal spell effects.. cept for greaves!! grr

just my 2cp

Innovative <Nobles>
Fennin Ro
▲ Page top
RE: sweet sword
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2003 at 10:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255042574
16 posts
ummmm... I'm only a 25th level pally, and I'm not twinked at all (my primary weapon is a Dwarven Axe!) so I haven't had the privelage of owning an item that proc's. My question is this: do items that proc or are clickable use up your mana? Cuz if they don't, that's sweet. That'd be one less spell you have to use mana on, regardless of what spell it is. There's nothing to complain about there.
▲ Page top
RE: sweet sword
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2003 at 5:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254498783
124 posts
To answer your question mouseman, a proc or clickable item does not consume any of your mana. Happy hunting :)
▲ Page top
RE: sweet sword

# Aug 01 2002 at 4:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780866939
8 posts
Ummm, i believe DW greaves have the effect of Spirit Strength

__DEL__1591768511736

he means that Deepwater Greaves are the only armor piece that have a spell that Paladins don't already have.

#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 22 2002 at 10:59 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) VI sucks, eh? Yeah, well without them you wouldn't be playing this game. Shut up, ungrateful brat.
Awesome
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2002 at 12:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769279137
14 posts
Was playing my Paladin, Mjollner on BB server this evening. Hanging out in OOT killing seafuries and I get a tell from a freind to git my butt into the pits in Velks and loot it before it rots. So after calming down a bit, get a port from my wonderful guild leader (thats Attreyu) and haul off to Velks. Shout for an escort cause I have no idea where to go, a special thanks to Gentatsu for sacrificing his life in my pursuit of "uberstuffs". This thing rocks.
▲ Page top
RE: Awesome
QuoteReply
# May 26 2002 at 6:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766066774
14 posts
This Sword is Awesome, was just sniffin around with some guildies on Veeshan trying ot find somewhere to camp and I see the shout " Pally Sword in Pits" so send a tell to the guy to say I'll be right there, turns out its an alt of a friend of mine I grouped with in my early days , he said he would hold for me. After getting a guide down to the pit I drop into the middle of 3 mobs not knowing where to go and thank god for LOH, hehe! Sword was on mob very close to ramp out looks SWEET!! and was nice enough to have ,me switch back to 1hs from my usual 2hs.

I just want to thank Moza for his generosity cause another Pally was /shout will donate 3k to loot sword.

Vrekim Steelheart
Cavalier of the 53rd season
Veeshan Server
▲ Page top
Woot got one today
QuoteReply
# Mar 30 2002 at 2:09 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591758911718
29 posts
Dropped for me today with a guild group, and I was the only paladin :)

As of today it is 19/25 10ac and 50 Mana. I noticed a nice improvement over the Sword of the morning, and I like the 10ac over the dex. We killed the mob that drops this twice and a PH 3 times. I heard this is very rare and usually the SK sword of pain drops instead. Good luck!

Edited, Sun Mar 31 14:39:58 2002

This dropped in the pit last night off Jelek Icepaw. It is exactly what the pic shows...19/25 10ac 50mana effect: purge. Good luck.

▲ Page top
Sporn Location
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2001 at 5:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248137422
1 post
This dropped in Lower Dogs...

If you know the first room where 5 dogs are (not too far in), its the next room up where 3 dogs sporn, Jelek sporned in the middle of the 3 dogs. Other sporns include any dogs as well as a cleric dog.

The guy was yellow to me at 57 (I'm betting its 58). The fight wasn't too hard... tho it would be best to get a Bard to solo pull him...

# Dec 23 2000 at 3:34 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The PURGE effect is like the CLENSE effect on the Shining Star of Light except it is weaker.

It cures poison and disease.
